response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:05: Intro animation identified. 2. 00:05-03:17: Identified song '暁闇エクスデス' via on-screen credits, PandaBOY identified as composer. 3. 03:17-04:05: Concert teaser identified. 4. 04:05-04:58: Post-performance talk identified. 5. Lyrics for '暁闇エクスデス' transcribed based on song performance.
response.global_summary: The video features a music video performance of the song '暁闇エクスデス' by the VTuber group holoX (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Kazama Iroha). This performance is framed by an introductory logo animation, a teaser announcement for a future concert, and a brief post-performance talk among the group members.

scenes.description: Intro animation featuring the 'holoX' logo, ending with 'LET'S GO' text.
The song '暁闇エクスデス' (composed by PandaBOY) begins, featuring a full performance by holoX. On-screen text credits PandaBOY for lyrics, composition, and arrangement.

The time is ripe, spirits who have appeared from the dawn darkness, are you ready!!

scenes.description: Concert teaser and announcement, featuring phone interface elements, dates, and 'PIA ARENA MM' text. No vocal music.
Post-performance banter and closing statements by the four members of holoX. No vocal music.
